text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well hey there, I'm Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any lofty dreams or anything like
that, but yeaaah, it sure is fun to surprise
everybody with my running. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll hardly try but—I mean, I'll try hard, but
let's just take it nice and easy, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
